confluence.label: BULLISH
confluence.headline: Bias bullish: expect dips bought while price holds above 465.44.
bullets: Momentum confirmation on breaks through OR high 465.77.
If structure rotates below VWAP, reduce long aggression.

confluence.label: NEUTRAL
confluence.headline: Bias neutral: balance around 587.77, wait for range break.
bullets: Take quicker profits in choppy structure.
Switch directional only after clean acceptance outside range.
